description: Create a content slide on simplified access to private equity with a two-column layout: a headline and banner message on top, plus a comparison-style table listing investor benefits on the left and corresponding details on the right.

header.headline: Simplified way for investors to access private equity
header.sub: Get invested, stay invested, and compound returns over time

rows: Expected liquidity through quarterly tender offers
Accredited Investor and Qualified Clients; $1.1 million invested in the Fund with the Adviser OR $2.2 million investable assets OR a Qualified Purchaser

footer.source: 1 The $25,000 minimum investment applies to Class S and Class D shares. Class I shares have a minimum investment of $1.0 million. 2 The strategy expects to offer investors limited quarterly liquidity through a tender offer process. Under normal market conditions, the Adviser expects to recommend that the Fund repurchase 5% of its outstanding shares at their net asset value. No assurance can be given that such tender offers will be approved by the Board. If a tender offer is oversubscribed, investors may be subject to pro rata reduction in the Shares ultimately repurchased by the Fund. All terms of each tender offer will be publicly disclosed. 3 Investors must be considered both an Accredited Investor, as defined Regulation D Rule 501, and Qualified Client, as defined in the Investment Advisers Act of 1940. 4 The Adviser is defined as J.P. Morgan Investment Management Inc. (JPMIM). 5 As defined in the Investment Company Act of 1940.
